calcofi4db 2.5.5
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Delete all objects under a GCS prefix

Source: R/cloud.R
delete_gcs_prefix.Rd

Recursively deletes all objects matching the given prefix in a GCS bucket. Uses gcloud storage rm -r under the hood. Always requires explicit confirmation via dry_run = FALSE.

Usage

delete_gcs_prefix(prefix, bucket = "calcofi-db", dry_run = TRUE)

Arguments

prefix

GCS prefix to delete (e.g., "ingest/old_dataset/")

bucket

GCS bucket name (default: "calcofi-db")

dry_run

If TRUE (default), only list what would be deleted

Value

Tibble with prefix and action (would_delete / deleted)
